prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register_preparation_target vanguard_unit)
(reserve_resource_for_preparation_target vanguard_unit resource_token_ore)
(assign_consumable_to_preparation_target vanguard_unit healing_potion_class)
(confirm_consumable_assignment vanguard_unit healing_potion_class)
(unassign_consumable_from_preparation_target vanguard_unit healing_potion_class)
(equip_tool_on_preparation_target vanguard_unit tinker_kit)

(equip_tool_for_primary_attachment_point vanguard_unit main_weapon_mount tinker_kit)
(unequip_tool_from_preparation_target vanguard_unit tinker_kit)
(unassign_consumable_from_preparation_target vanguard_unit healing_potion_class)
(register_preparation_target support_unit)
(reserve_resource_for_preparation_target support_unit resource_token_herb)

(unassign_consumable_from_preparation_target support_unit healing_potion_class)
(equip_tool_on_preparation_target support_unit tinker_kit)

(equip_tool_for_secondary_upgrade_node support_unit upgrade_socket_1 tinker_kit)

(unassign_consumable_from_preparation_target support_unit healing_potion_class)
(assemble_gear_standard vanguard_unit support_unit main_weapon_mount upgrade_socket_1 gear_frame_alpha)
(assign_consumable_to_preparation_target vanguard_unit healing_potion_class)
(finalize_gear_processing gear_frame_alpha vanguard_unit healing_potion_class)
(apply_gear_to_primary_unit vanguard_unit gear_frame_alpha)
(apply_gear_to_secondary_unit support_unit gear_frame_alpha)
(unassign_consumable_from_preparation_target vanguard_unit healing_potion_class)
(register_preparation_target assault_loadout)
(reserve_resource_for_preparation_target assault_loadout resource_token_oil)
(assign_consumable_to_preparation_target assault_loadout healing_potion_class)
(confirm_consumable_assignment assault_loadout healing_potion_class)
(consume_material_for_gear assault_loadout iron_ingot gear_frame_alpha)
(finalize_material_in_profile assault_loadout iron_ingot gear_frame_alpha healing_potion_class)
(equip_tool_on_preparation_target assault_loadout tinker_kit)
(attach_weapon_attachment_to_profile assault_loadout weapon_scope_mk1)
(apply_modifier_weapon_attachment_step1 assault_loadout weapon_scope_mk1 tinker_kit iron_ingot gear_frame_alpha)
(attach_augment_module_to_profile assault_loadout augment_core_alpha)
(start_augment_installation assault_loadout augment_core_alpha iron_ingot gear_frame_alpha)
(confirm_profile_without_chip assault_loadout)
(apply_consumable_container_to_preparation_target assault_loadout small_charge_pack healing_potion_class)
(distribute_resource_to_profile assault_loadout resource_token_oil small_charge_pack)
(unassign_consumable_from_preparation_target assault_loadout healing_potion_class)
(unequip_tool_from_preparation_target assault_loadout tinker_kit)
(detach_weapon_attachment_from_profile assault_loadout weapon_scope_mk1)
(detach_augment_module_from_profile assault_loadout augment_core_alpha)
(register_preparation_target support_loadout)
(reserve_resource_for_preparation_target support_loadout resource_token_oil)
(assign_consumable_to_preparation_target support_loadout healing_potion_class)
(confirm_consumable_assignment support_loadout healing_potion_class)
(consume_material_for_gear support_loadout leather_strip gear_frame_alpha)
(finalize_material_in_profile support_loadout leather_strip gear_frame_alpha healing_potion_class)
(equip_tool_on_preparation_target support_loadout tinker_kit)
(attach_weapon_attachment_to_profile support_loadout weapon_scope_mk1)
(apply_modifier_weapon_attachment_step1 support_loadout weapon_scope_mk1 tinker_kit leather_strip gear_frame_alpha)
(attach_augment_module_to_profile support_loadout augment_core_alpha)
(start_augment_installation support_loadout augment_core_alpha leather_strip gear_frame_alpha)
(confirm_profile_without_chip support_loadout)
(apply_consumable_container_to_preparation_target support_loadout small_charge_pack healing_potion_class)
(distribute_resource_to_profile support_loadout resource_token_oil small_charge_pack)
(unassign_consumable_from_preparation_target support_loadout healing_potion_class)
(assign_consumable_to_preparation_target vanguard_unit healing_potion_class)

(distribute_resource_to_primary vanguard_unit resource_token_ore small_charge_pack)

(apply_consumable_container_to_preparation_target support_unit small_charge_pack healing_potion_class)
(distribute_resource_to_secondary support_unit resource_token_herb small_charge_pack)
message.reasoning:
The problem involves preparing for a boss fight with units and loadouts. The goals are to make vanguard_unit, support_unit, assault_loadout, and support_loadout all prepared_for_battle.


## Defining Battle Preparation  
- The task focuses on preparing for a boss fight by ensuring units and loadouts are ready.  
- Goals include making vanguard_unit, support_unit, assault_loadout, and support_loadout prepared_for_battle.

## Defining Battle Preparation  
- The task focuses on preparing for a boss fight by ensuring units and loadouts are ready.  
- Goals include making vanguard_unit, support_unit, assault_loadout, and support_loadout prepared_for_battle.  
- All four—vanguard_unit, support_unit, assault_loadout, support_loadout—are preparation_targets, needing specific actions to achieve readiness.  
- Units (vanguard_unit, support_unit) and profiles (assault_loadout, support_loadout) follow different preparation paths, complicating the process.  

## Checking Preparation Requirements  
- Achieving prepared_for_battle requires distribute_resource_* actions, linked to consumable_applied_to_target, resource_allocated_to_target, and consumable_container_assigned.  
- Consumable application needs equipment_applied_to_target, which varies by target type: profiles use profile_confirmed, units use apply_gear_to_*.  

## Exploring Resource Constraints  
- Limited consumables include one healing_potion_class, one tinker_kit, and one minor_healing_potion, impacting preparation strategy.  
- Both loadouts (assault_loadout, support_loadout) link to vanguard_unit as primary and support_unit as secondary, sharing gear like gear_frame_alpha.  

## Planning Preparation Steps  
- Start by registering all preparation_targets with (register_preparation_target ?pt) for each: vanguard_unit, support_unit, assault_loadout, support_loadout.  
- Next, reserve resources, assign consumables, and confirm assignments to make each target preparation_ready, considering limited consumables.

## Planning Preparation Steps
- To prepare units, reserve attachment points (AP) and upgrade nodes (UN) for primary (vanguard) and secondary (support) units, but only one healing_potion_class is available.
- For AP reservation, assign consumable_class first (e.g., reserve_attachment_point_for_primary vanguard main_weapon_mount healing_potion_class), then proceed, but can’t assign to both units simultaneously due to limited resources.

## Exploring Unit Readiness Paths
- Achieving primary_unit_ready involves either equipping tools (equip_tool_for_primary_attachment_point) or loading materials (load_material_on_primary_attachment_point), both requiring preparation_ready status.
- Tool equipping needs tool_attached_to_target and AP reserved, while material loading uses consumable_instance (e.g., minor_healing_potion) to set ready without immediate confirmation.

## Checking Gear Assembly Requirements
- Gear assembly (e.g., gear_frame_alpha) requires both units ready, AP and UN reserved, and both confirmed, but limited resources like one healing_potion_class complicate simultaneous preparation.
- Alternative paths include using available instances (minor_healing_potion) or tools (tinker_kit) to achieve readiness, balancing resource allocation for multiple targets.

## Examining Unit Preparation Sequence  
- Assign healing_potion_class to vanguard_unit for preparation, ensuring it's preparation_ready before finalizing gear.  
- After finalizing gear_frame_alpha, apply it to both vanguard and support units, as the gear allows shared use without exclusivity.  

## Managing Consumable Assignments  
- Apply small_charge_pack to vanguard_unit for consumable_applied, requiring the healing_potion_class still assigned post-gear finalization.  
- Distribute resources like resource_token_ore to vanguard_unit, setting it prepared_for_battle and freeing the container, but only one small_charge_pack limits sequencing.  

## Planning Profile Preparation  
- Register assault_loadout and reserve resource_token_oil, but first need to unassign healing_potion_class from vanguard_unit after its preparation.  
- After unassigning, assign healing_potion_class to assault_loadout for further consumable and resource distribution, ensuring proper sequencing.

## Assessing Profile Readiness Paths  
- Achieving final_stage_ready allows confirming profiles without chips, setting equipment_applied and confirmed status, simplifying the process.  
- An alternative unique_token path exists, requiring preparation_ready, assigned class, and available unique tokens (e.g., amulet_of_valor for assault_loadout), but sigil_of_protection is unavailable for support_loadout.  

## Evaluating Resource Constraints  
- Resources (ore, herb, oil) are limited to 3 tokens for 4 targets (2 units, 2 profiles), requiring sequential preparation where tokens are freed after distribution.  
- Container and class assignments are single-use and unassignable, necessitating careful sequencing to avoid conflicts, especially with only one container available.  

## Planning Preparation Sequence  
- Prepare units (vanguard and support) to primary_attachment_confirmed and ready, reserving AP, but delay completion to prioritize gear assembly.  
- After gear application, proceed with container assignments and resource distribution, ensuring each target is fully prepared before moving to the next.

## Detaching Equipment for Reuse  
- Detach weapon_scope_mk1, augment_core_alpha, and tinker_kit from assault_loadout after preparation, making them available for support_loadout.  
- This allows sharing limited resources, ensuring support_loadout can use the same attachments and tools previously assigned.  

## Preparing Support Loadout  
- Register support_loadout, reserve resource_token_oil, and assign class, setting it to ready for further steps.  
- Consume leather_strip for gear_frame_alpha, bind it to gear, and finalize materials, ensuring support_loadout is material-ready.  

## Applying Modifiers and Augments  
- Use leather_strip for apply_modifier_weapon_attachment_step1 on support_loadout with weapon_scope_mk1, leveraging bound materials.  
- Attach augment_core_alpha and confirm_without_chip, setting equipment_applied status for support_loadout, completing its preparation.  

## Finalizing Support Preparation  
- Apply small_charge_pack container to support_loadout, achieving consumable_applied status.  
- Distribute resource_token_oil to support_loadout, finalizing preparation and freeing tokens for subsequent tasks.

## Finalizing Unit Preparation  
- Assemble gear for vanguard_unit and support_unit using main_weapon_mount, upgrade_socket_1, and gear_frame_alpha.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
